⚡ TechPrism

Privacy Policy

Last updated: March 6, 2026

TechPrism ("we", "our", or "us") operates the website techprismhq.com and associated social media accounts. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect information when you use our services.

1. Information We Collect

We collect minimal information necessary to operate our service:

  • Usage Data: Pages visited, time spent, referral URLs (via standard web analytics).
  • Cookies: Small files stored by your browser to remember preferences. You may disable cookies in your browser settings.
  • Affiliate Click Data: When you click an Amazon affiliate link, Amazon may collect data per their own privacy policy.

We do not collect your name, email, or payment information directly.

2. How We Use Information

  • To analyze website traffic and improve content
  • To understand which products and deals are most relevant to visitors
  • To maintain and improve the TechPrism platform

3. Amazon Affiliate Disclosure

TechPrism is a participant in the Amazon Services LLC Associates Program, an affiliate advertising program designed to provide a means for sites to earn advertising fees by advertising and linking to Amazon.com.

When you click an affiliate link and make a purchase, we may earn a small commission at no extra cost to you. Prices and availability shown are accurate at time of posting and may change.

4. Third-Party Services

We use the following third-party services that may collect data independently:

  • Amazon Associates: Affiliate tracking — Amazon Privacy Policy
  • Meta (Facebook / Instagram): Social content distribution
  • YouTube / Google: Video hosting and analytics
  • TikTok: Short-form video distribution
  • GitHub Pages: Website hosting

5. Cookies

We use cookies for analytics and affiliate link attribution. By using this site, you consent to the use of cookies in accordance with this policy. You can control cookies through your browser's settings.

6. Data Retention

We do not store personal data on our servers. Any analytics data is retained only as long as necessary to understand usage trends, typically no longer than 26 months.

7. Children's Privacy

TechPrism is not directed at children under 13. We do not knowingly collect data from children. If you believe a child has provided us with personal information, please contact us.

8. Your Rights

Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have rights including access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data. To exercise these rights, contact us at the email below.

9. Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated date. Continued use of the site after changes constitutes acceptance.

10. Contact

For privacy-related inquiries, contact us at: privacy@techprismhq.com

© 2026 TechPrism. All rights reserved.  |  Privacy Policy  |  Terms of Service  |  Home
